# Typesense Maintenance Instructions

- Keep module ownership clear.
- Update docs with behavior changes.
- Add verification steps before release.
- Do not introduce provider lock-in outside the module boundary.

# Typesense Guidance

- Keep admin keys server-only.
- Document collection schema and searchable fields.
- Use search-only keys on the client.
- Verify collection migration and reindex paths.
